'''âw-j-g-f''' ('''kawajgefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loathe|loathe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loathe|loathe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-j-g-f
|-
! Lemma
| kawajgefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwajgefoko|thiwajgefoko]] || [[word:jiwajgefoko|jiwajgefoko]] || [[word:shiwajgefoko|shiwajgefoko]] || [[word:kiwajgefoko|kiwajgefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwajgefoko|thuthuwajgefoko]] || [[word:jujuwajgefoko|jujuwajgefoko]] || [[word:shushuwajgefoko|shushuwajgefoko]] || [[word:kukuwajgefoko|kukuwajgefoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwajgefoko|thuwajgefoko]] || [[word:juwajgefoko|juwajgefoko]] || [[word:shuwajgefoko|shuwajgefoko]] || [[word:kuwajgefoko|kuwajgefoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowajgefoko|thowajgefoko]] || [[word:jowajgefoko|jowajgefoko]] || [[word:showajgefoko|showajgefoko]] || [[word:kowajgefoko|kowajgefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowajgefoko|thowajgefoko]] || [[word:jowajgefoko|jowajgefoko]] || [[word:showajgefoko|showajgefoko]] || [[word:kowajgefoko|kowajgefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwajgefoko|thĂŠwajgefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠwajgefoko|jĂŠwajgefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠwajgefoko|shĂŠwajgefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠwajgefoko|kĂŠwajgefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawajgefoko|thathawajgefoko]] || [[word:jajawajgefoko|jajawajgefoko]] || [[word:shashawajgefoko|shashawajgefoko]] || [[word:kakawajgefoko|kakawajgefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawajgefoko|thawajgefoko]] || [[word:jawajgefoko|jawajgefoko]] || [[word:shawajgefoko|shawajgefoko]] || [[word:kawajgefoko|kawajgefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawajgefoko|thawajgefoko]] || [[word:jawajgefoko|jawajgefoko]] || [[word:shawajgefoko|shawajgefoko]] || [[word:kawajgefoko|kawajgefoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
